properties.name: Boston Climate Action Network
properties.summary: The Boston Climate Action Network (BCAN) is a grassroots organization focused on building community power for climate justice in Boston. It organizes residents and collaborates with social justice allies to advocate for climate justice and urgent action on climate issues by the City of Boston and other policymakers.
